title: SGLT-2 Inhibitors in Patients with Heart Failure and Type 2 Diabetes: a Meta-analysis
abstract: OBJECTIVE: We performed a systematic review and meta-analysis of cardiovascular outcome trials with SGLT-2 inhibitors to estimate the effects on heart failure hospitalization, cardiovascular death, and kidney outcomes in patients with type 2 diabetes. METHODS: We searched MEDLINE, Embase, and Cochrane databases. Eligible trials were randomized controlled trials of SGLT-2 inhibitors reporting prespecified cardiovascular or kidney outcomes. RESULTS: Five trials were included (n=46 969). SGLT-2 inhibitors significantly reduced risk of heart failure hospitalization (RR 0.68, 95% CI 0.61-0.76) and kidney disease progression (RR 0.55, 95% CI 0.48-0.64). Results were consistent across subgroups defined by established cardiovascular disease.
